verses.text: Note pen Khrih tawh a thokik khinte na hih manun, Pasian' taklam a kumpi tokhom tungah Khrih a tutna mun vantung thute ngaihsutin nei un
Vantungah a om thute ngaihsutin nei un la, leitungah a om thute ngaihsutin nei kei un
Note a sikhin na hi uh a, note' nuntakna pen Khrih tawh Pasian' sungah a kiseelkhawm ahi hi
Note' nuntakna taktak Khrih ahih manin amah hong kilat ciangin note zong amah tawh hong kilang khawmin amah tawh na minthang khawm ding uh hi.
Tua ahih manin nulepa mawhna, a kilawmlo gamtatna, hukna lanna, a hoihlo lunggulhna, leh milim biakna nam khat ahih manin huaihamna ahi note sungah a om leitung lungsimte na sisak un
Ama thu a manglo mite tungah hihbang gamtatna hangin Pasian' hehna hong tung ding hi
Note pen hihbangin gamta-in a nungta ngeite na hi uh hi
Ahi zongin tu-in hehna, thangpaihna, muhdahna, gensiatna, kam hoihlo pauna cihte nei nawn kei un
Ngeina lui leh gamtatna lui khempeuh a beisakkhin na hihna uh kithei-in khatlekhat tungah zuauthu kigen nawn kei un la
ngeina thak tawh kituakin gamta un. Eite a hong piangsak Pasian a kicing takin i theih semsemna dingin amah a sun dingin a hong thakbawl tawntung ahi hi

Tua ahih manin Gentail mi leh Jew mi, vun-at mi leh vun-atloh mi, khuapi mi leh khuaneu mi, sila leh sila a hilo, cih bangin a kilamdan'na omlo a, Khrih pen mi khempeuh-a' ding hi thei a, thu khempeuh-a' ding hi thei a, thu khempeuhah amah bek ahi hi
Pasian in note hong itin, hong teelin, ama mi siangthote hikhin na hih manun note pen hehpihna nei-in, migi-in, kiniamkhiatin, dikin, na lungduai ding uh ahi hi

Note lakah khatlekhat a kilungkimlo na om uh ciangin khatlekhat na mawhna uh kimaisakin na kihuh ciat un. Topa in note' mawhna hong maisak bangin note zong khatlekhat na mawhna uh na kimaisak ding uh hi
Hihte khempeuh banah, mi khempeuh kilem takin a hong om khawmsak thei ahi ki-itna na bulphuh un
Note pumkhat suakin a lungdam khawm dingin Pasian in a hong sap ahih mah bangin Khrih hong piak nopsakna in note' lungsim hong uk ta hen la, lungdamin om ta un
Khrih thu a cingtakin note lungsimah hong om hen la, pilna tawh khatlekhat thu kihilhin na kitai un. Pasian tungah lungdam kohna-in Thuciam Lui sunga late, la thakte, leh biakna late na sa un
Na kampauna, na gamtatnate khempeuh uhah, Topa Jesuh hangin Pa Pasian tungah lungdam kohna-in Jesuh min paulamin na hih ding uh hi.
Zite aw, Khristiante gamtat dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin na pasalte uh thu na mang un
Pasalte aw, na zite uh it un la, amaute tungah ngongtat kei un
Tate aw, na nu na pate uh thu man' tawntung ding pen na Khristian nasep uh ahi hi. Tua bang thuman'na in Pasian lungdamsak hi
Pate aw, na tate un a thuak zawhloh zah dong dingin thuhilhin taii niloh kei un
Silate aw, thu khempeuhah na leitung topa uh thu na mang un. Amau' hong pahtak ding deihna tawh a hong muhsung bekin a hoih tatte hi kei un la, Topa na zahtakna uh hangin lungsim tak tawh gamta un
Mite' nasem bangin kingaihsun loin, Pasian' nasem bangin kingaihsun un la, na sep peuhpeuh uh lungsim takpi tawh lawpin sem un
Topa in note tungah thaman a hong piakding lamtak phawk gige un. Tua bangin na sepna uhah Khrih Topa' na a semsem na hi uh hi
A manloin a gamtate in ahih leh a gamtatna bangun thuak ding uh hi. Pasian in kuamah deidan loin amau' gamtatna bang ciatin thu a khen ahi hi.
